name: ExtensionOperationDefinition_Parameter_Scope
title: R5: instance | type | system (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` 0..* `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` 0..* `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` has a context of OperationDefinition.parameter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `OperationDefinition`.
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` has a context of OperationDefinition.parameter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `OperationDefinition`.
Element `OperationDefinition.parameter.scope` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: If present, indicates that the parameter applies when the operation is being invoked at the specified level.
